subject.name: SubscribeCard
subject.purpose: Inline newsletter subscribe card placed mid-page; collects an email and confirms inline.

exemplars_say: One email a week. No noise.

behavior: Email input + submit button on one row at desktop; stacked on mobile
On success, swap the form for an inline success message
On error, show the error string under the input

accessibility.keyboard_nav: input -> submit tab order; submit triggers on Enter; visible focus ring

states.loading: submit button shows spinner; input disabled
states.success: form replaced by success message using semantic_success
states.error: error string under input using semantic_error

instructions_for_external_tool: You are generating a component named SubscribeCard. Purpose: inline newsletter subscribe card; collects an email and confirms inline. You MUST use ONLY the design tokens provided in brand_context — do not invent colors, fonts, or spacing values. Framework: react + shadcn + tailwind. Return code only. Single file. Prepend a component-output-v1 metadata header (a JSON block in a leading /* */ comment with $schema, $version, type, brief_id, tool_used, timestamp). brief_id must be subscribe-card-2026-06-14T17-05-00Z. Accessibility: heading is an h2; 4.5:1 contrast; input -> submit tab order with visible focus ring; submit on Enter.
